title: Sutro Sam: San Francisco's Celebrity River Otter

title: River otter Marin County, CA.
content: Otters do not make their own dens but use old dens established by other burrowing animals along riverways and creeks. They are fun to watch and

title: Sea otters and other wildlife near San Francisco
content: It's too bad the only wildlife you saw at Pt. Reyes were the cows, warmwinds. The park has a great variety. If you have a day there,

title: [Los Angeles to San Francisco] Vacationer Looking for the ...
content: Monterey Bay Aquarium in Monterey. They rescue sea otters and release them, and have a wonderful display where you can watch them for hours.
